scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run dev --workspace @school-erp/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run dev --workspace @school-erp/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run build --workspace @school-erp/api && npm run build --workspace @school-erp/web && npm run build --workspace @school-erp/mobile
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run test --workspace @school-erp/api && npm run test --workspace @school-erp/mobile
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/api && npm run lint --workspace @school-erp/web && npm run lint --workspace @school-erp/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/mobile
